briefing: Markets posted a mild pullback today (NASDAQ -0.3%, S&P 500 -0.5%), confirming a neutral tape with no real directional catalyst. Per learned strategy, neutral days call for patience — $677 in cash stays dry until a genuine risk-on signal (NASDAQ +2%+) appears, at which point PENG, MTZ, BIDU, or TNGX are the top candidates given their perfect multi-signal confirmation. All six existing positions remain intact, with automated stop-losses and profit targets doing the monitoring work.

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Risk-off describes a market mood where investors become cautious and pull back from higher-risk assets like growth stocks, preferring to hold cash or safer assets instead. On days like today — where the major indexes drift slightly negative with no clear bullish catalyst — deploying new capital into momentum names increases the chance of buying into weakness. The strategy of waiting for a strong risk-on signal before buying is a practical way to avoid that trap.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「風險規避」（Risk-Off）是指投資者情緒趨於謹慎、減少對高風險資產（如成長股）配置、轉而持有現金或避險資產的市場狀態。在今天這樣的行情下——主要指數小幅下跌且缺乏明確多頭催化劑——貿然追入動能股，容易在弱勢中接盤。因此，等待明確的風險偏好（Risk-On）信號再進場，是控制買入成本風險的實用策略。

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities drifted lower on Wednesday as investors paused following a strong recent rally, with no major catalysts to extend gains. Rotation out of technology names weighed on the NASDAQ slightly more than the broader S&P 500, consistent with profit-taking after an extended run. Treasury yields remained stable, suggesting the pullback reflected consolidation rather than renewed macro fear.
market_education.summary_zh: 美國股市週三小幅下跌，投資者在近期強勁反彈後選擇觀望，市場缺乏明確的上漲催化劑。科技股的獲利了結令那斯達克指數承壓略高於標普500，走勢符合多頭行情高位整固的典型模式。公債殖利率維持平穩，顯示此次回調屬技術性調整，而非宏觀基本面惡化所致。
